title: Invite a Seller to Your Dossier
description: Sellers want updates too. Send them a private view of the file in one tap.
voiceover_script: Hi, I'm Dossie. If you represent the seller, invite them straight from the dossier. Open the file, tap the seller's name, and send the invite. They get a clean view of the timeline, the option period, the inspection window, and every milestone as it happens. You stop being their voicemail. I keep them in the loop for you.
